title: callista anceps
intro: Callista anceps, also known as the two-horned moon shell, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Mimosaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Callista anceps are typically made by drying and boiling the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional remedies.
